name: Peter Omondi
title: From One Plot To A Five-Acre Portfolio
summary: Peter bought his first quarter-acre plot in Kitengela in 2019. Three years later, he reinvested the appreciated value into four more plots across two counties.

name: Mary Wambui
title: Built A Rental Income Stream From Commercial Land
summary: Mary purchased a commercial plot in Ruiru and developed rental units, now generating consistent monthly income well above her initial investment.

name: Joseph Kamau
title: Secured His Children's University Fund Through Land
summary: Joseph invested in a Konza plot specifically to fund his children's education. The plot's appreciation has already covered two years of tuition.
